nodes.title: List Partners
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/partners with Authorization header. Returns array of partners with {id, name, type, phone, accountId}. Partner types include: customer, supplier, agent.

nodes.title: Create Partner
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/partners with {name, type, phone?, accountId?}. Creates partner record. Returns created partner.

nodes.title: Update Partner
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/partners/:id with {name?, type?, phone?, accountId?}. Updates partner fields. Returns updated partner.

nodes.title: Delete Partner
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/partners/:id. Removes partner record. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Manage Settlements
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/settlements returns partner settlement records. POST /api/businesses/:bizId/settlements with {partnerId, amount, date, description} creates settlement. PUT and DELETE also supported.
